data.title: Tryg initiated a share buyback programme of up to DKK 1.0 billion on 22 Jan 2026. Program will end by 13 May 2026.
data.description: Tryg A/S disclosed on January 22, 2026, its plan to start a share repurchase initiative totaling DKK 1.0 billion. This buyback plan complies with the EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014, and the guidelines of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. The programme will conclude by May 13, 2026.

data.title: Ouster (Nasdaq: OUST) to report Q4 2025 earnings on March 2, 2026 after market close, with conference call at 5p.m. ET.
data.description: San Francisco-headquartered Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST), a top player in high-performance lidar sensors and intelligent software solutions for various sectors, is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The report will be made public after the market closes on Monday, March 2, 2026. A conference call discussing these results will be held on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Merck & Revolution Medicines deal talks collapse over valuation disagreement. Merck aimed for $28-32B deal but valued RM at $30B. Merck prefers smaller $15B deals.
data.description: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE: MRK) has ceased negotiations to purchase Revolution Medicines, Inc. (NASDAQ: RVMD) due to a disagreement over valuation. The potential deal, initially reported in January, could have seen Merck acquiring Revolution Medicines for a value ranging between $28 billion and $32 billion. Despite this, the talks valued Revolution Medicines at around $30 billion. According to sources, Merck remains disciplined in deal size, as highlighted by CEO Robert Davis at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. Merck typically targets acquisitions under $15 billion, although larger transactions are considered under favorable circumstances. This decision demonstrates Merck's strategic approach to acquisitions, emphasizing financial prudence and calculated growth opportunities in the oncology sector.

data.title: ICE released data showing increased refinance activity driving prepayments towards 3.5-year high due to lower interest rates.
data.description: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--ICE Mortgage Technology, a leading provider of comprehensive mortgage solutions and a subsidiary of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), has unveiled the December 2025 ICE First Look report on mortgage delinquency, foreclosure, and prepayment trends. According to Andy Walden, Head of Mortgage and Housing Market Research at ICE, the latest data indicates a surge in refinancing and prepayment rates due to reduced interest rates, reaching the highest levels in several years.

data.title: FDA approves MannKind's updated Afrezza label with starting dose guidance for switching from MDI or insulin pump therapy.
data.description: MannKind has recently received FDA approval for an updated label for Afrezza®. The label now includes starting dose recommendations for patients transitioning from Multiple Daily Injections (MDI) or insulin. This approval brings significant value to patients as they switch medications. The new guidance on dosing will assist healthcare providers in prescribing Afrezza® more effectively. This update underscores MannKind's commitment to improving patient outcomes.

data.title: EU is investigating Elon Musk's X for sexualized AI images made by Grok. Lack of controls led to widespread use of deepfakes.
data.description: Authorities have stated that the company's inadequate controls have resulted in the extensive utilization of deepfakes generated by the chatbot Grok.

data.title: K92 Mining outlines plan for significant production growth and exploration program by 2026.
data.description: K92 Mining has unveiled its operational guidance for 2026, revealing plans for substantial production growth and an extensive exploration program. The company aims to increase its output significantly, with a focus on expanding its operations and maximizing resources. This strategic initiative involves investing in exploration activities to identify new reserves and enhance overall production. The program is expected to drive growth and create opportunities for the company, positioning it well for success in the coming years.

data.title: Leidos to acquire ENTRUST to boost energy infrastructure, expanding utility market reach and revenue growth.
data.description: Leidos has recently completed an acquisition that will enhance its presence in the utility sector, particularly in the gas and electric generation infrastructure markets. This move is expected to broaden their capabilities and customer base significantly. The acquisition is projected to have an immediate positive impact on Leidos' revenue growth and EBITDA margin. This strategic decision underscores Leidos' commitment to tapping into the growing and robust utility budgets.

data.title: Arizona parents seek school choice options with over 1,020 schools participating in National School Choice Week.
data.description: Starting today, National School Choice Week kicks off in Arizona and nationwide, aiming to assist parents in selecting the best K-12 schools for their kids. Over 1,020 schools and organizations in Arizona are participating in this initiative, joining others across the country.

data.title: Marriott International experienced exceptional global growth in 2025, with new brand offerings, luxury expansion, and record growth in branded residences.
data.description: In the year 2025, the company experienced significant growth, highlighted by the introduction of new brand offerings and notable advancements in the midscale and luxury sectors. There was also exceptional expansion in branded residences. The company, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, revealed these achievements on January 26, 2026. Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR) announced these results, showcasing remarkable progress in various areas.

data.description: In a recent announcement made on January 26, 2026, Franco-Nevada Corporation (TSX: FNV) (NYSE: FNV) stated that its Board of Directors has approved an increase in its quarterly dividend. The new quarterly dividend has been set at US$0. [exact amount not provided] per share.

data.title: U.S. luxury housing prices vary widely, with some metros at 2× typical listings, others at over 5×.
data.description: In select metropolitan areas, luxury homes are priced at a minimum of double the average listing price, with some locations going over five times that amount. As of the latest data from January 26, 2026, in Austin, Texas, there has been a leveling off of luxury home costs compared to the previous year's end. Disparities between luxury property prices and standard listings differed significantly among various housing markets, reflecting a diverse range of multiples.
